modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by an end user through a self-service form submission and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in a mixed and uneven structure and use a short and minimal tone. The writing should have excessive unnecessary detail and show limited technical understanding. There should be a few minor typos and some uncertain technical terminology.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Adopting the same textbook for multiple course sections

full_description_text: 
I’m trying to figure out how to use the same book for different classes I teach. Is there a way to do this all at once? I don’t want to have to pick the same book for each section separately. It seems like it should be easier, but I’m not sure how to go about it.
short_description: Adopting the same textbook for multiple course sections
